pricing_structure: CSC Parts operates a TRADE-ONLY / WHOLESALE enquiry-based model. No public RRP or online pricing is displayed on cscparts.com.au or cscgroup.com.au. Product pages feature an Enquiry Cart system with Contact for Quote. The digital catalogue (fliphtml5) contains stock codes and specifications but NO prices. Authorized retailers (e.g., Ultimax Industries) sell select CSC brands (Silverback, Flowtech, Blue Diamond, Husky, Thermal Armour) at retail prices with visible AUD pricing. Flowtech Advantage terms confirm: prices are available upon request, on invoice, or via current price list from CSC. Pricing is typically per-item (each), per-pack (nuts/bolts/gaskets), or per-metre (tube, heat tape).

summary: CSC Parts (cscparts.com.au / cscgroup.com.au) is a trade-only exhaust parts distributor with 2,241 products across categories including chrome stacks, mufflers, clamps, bends, tube, flex, gaskets, flanges, nuts/bolts, heat tape, thermal blankets, air rams, mudguards, wheel chocks, and catalytic converters. NO public RRP pricing is available on their website or digital catalogue. Prices are only available via enquiry cart, dealer account, or authorized retailers. We found 28 actual retail prices from authorized retailer Ultimax Industries for select Silverback, Flowtech, and Nelson-branded products. These retail prices range from 35.99 AUD (clamps) to 1,515.99 AUD (direct-fit truck muffler), with chrome stacks 842.99–1,334.99 AUD and universal truck mufflers 310.99–838.99 AUD. The remaining ~2,200+ parts have no discoverable public pricing.
recommendation: 1. CONTACT CSC PARTS DIRECTLY: Call 1300 885 089 or email sales@cscgroup.com.au to request their current trade/wholesale price list. They confirm in their T&Cs that a current price list is available upon request. 2. OPEN DEALER ACCOUNT: CSC Parts serves 1,098+ dealers across Australia/NZ; opening a trade account is the only way to get accurate trade pricing for all 2,241 SKUs. 3. USE RETAILER MARK-UP AS PROXY: Ultimax Industries prices can be used as a retail reference. Typical retail mark-up on exhaust parts appears to be 30–50% above trade. 4. PRIORITIZE HIGH-VALUE CATEGORIES: Focus pricing requests on high-volume categories first: Chrome Stacks (175 items), Mufflers/Silencers (160), DirectFit (149), Aussie Curve (116), Mild Steel Bends (105), Car/4WD Mufflers (102). 5. REQUEST STRUCTURED DATA: Ask CSC for a CSV/Excel price list with SKU, description, pack qty, and price per unit to enable bulk import into the website database.
